description: Inventory of a pawnshop, containing mostly clothing, bedding, household items, and jewelery with the sums which were given for the pawned objects. Dating: Probably 11th century. Most of the entries open with the word באבה in the sense of "for." People mentioned include the wife of Abū l-Ṭāhir; al-Sharīf; al-Khwārazmī; Hārūn; the daughter of Abū l-[...]; the wife (bayt) of al-Qarqūbī; [...] al-Ṣabbāgh; Mudallal; Sitt Saʿāda; a female slave (jāriya); Ibn Abū Dhirāʿ; Abū l-Surūr. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מלאי בית עבוט הכולל בעיקר ביגוד, מצעים, כלי בית ותכשיטים עם הסכומים שניתנו עבור הפריטים הממושכנים; כנראה מהמאה ה-11
